focus: Thorough hygiene code review of the main production monitoring React UI (Vite+React 18+TS at frontend/). Focus: cleanliness, duplication (styles, charts, fetches), component structure, prop drilling, TS hygiene, error/loading states, a11y, api.ts organization, unused code (9+ orphans), magic values, folder layout. Light review of Python/api_server.py feeder. Specific file:line findings + minimal concrete fixes. Report written to logs/frontend_hygiene_review.md.
artifacts: logs/frontend_hygiene_review.md (full findings, severity, prioritized minimal recommendations with file:line refs)
frontend/src/components/ (33 files reviewed; SafetyPanel, PipelinePanel, TradesPanel, EquityChart, TrainingPanel, etc.)
Python/api_server.py (light: WS/SSE contract, monolithic structure, endpoint hygiene)

key_findings_summary.critical: SafetyPanel broken import + fetch bypass (components/SafetyPanel.tsx:2,35). 9 orphaned never-imported components.
key_findings_summary.high: 803 inline style= occurrences + 20+ duplicated colors/panelStyle objects. Duplicate EquityChart impl in TradesPanel. No tsconfig.json. Near-zero a11y.
key_findings_summary.medium: Mixed self-fetch vs props (inconsistent data). Magic 15s/10s polls everywhere. Types duplicated across api.ts/types.ts. extractAgentStatus hardcoded magic.
key_findings_summary.improvements: P0: fix Safety, delete orphans, add tsconfig. P1: constants.ts, use existing CSS classes, centralize fetches, remove chart dupe.

references: runtime/agent_status/* (swarm visibility pattern used for this review)
